cannon_mounted.title: Mount the Create Big Cannon with nuclear shell loaded — ready to fire at a safe target location

nuclear_fired.title: Fire the Nuclear Shell at a designated test location — away from your settlement and structures

subtitle.text: The test site is 50 blocks minimum from anything you do not want destroyed. That is not a joke.

description: The Nuclear Shell creates a large explosion.
Do not fire it near your base, your settlement, or any structure you want to keep.
Pick a flat uninhabited area at least 50 blocks from anything important.
The explosion does not discriminate between structures.
Mount the cannon pointing at your test site.
The Create Big Cannon + Nuclear Shell combination is the highest-yield weapon
in this modpack. It is available to you because you built the infrastructure
and survived long enough to reach Ch17.
The people who built it spent the rest of their lives deciding what to do
with the knowledge that they had.
You fired one shell at an empty field.
That is probably the right call.
→ Fire at a safe test location [check]
